app_subtitle: A thinking analysis tool based on *Beyond Feelings*
api_key_help: Can also be set via the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable. Gemini Relay supports multiple keys (comma-separated) for load balancing
base_url_label: API Base URL (optional, leave blank for official endpoint)
input_placeholder: Enter the text you want to analyse (an opinion, news article, argument, etc.)…
error_no_key: ⚠️ Please enter your API Key in the sidebar first.
error_no_text: ⚠️ Please enter some text to analyse.
error_quota:
❌ API quota exceeded or not enabled!

Please check the quota and billing settings for your current provider (**{provider}**):
- **OpenAI**: [Billing](https://platform.openai.com/account/billing)
- **Google Gemini**: Confirm your API Key is enabled at [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
- **Zhipu**: [Console](https://open.bigmodel.cn/)
- **DeepSeek**: [Top up](https://platform.deepseek.com/)
- **Kimi**: [Console](https://platform.moonshot.cn/)
- **Qwen**: [Alibaba Cloud Bailian Console](https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/)
- **Groq**: [Console](https://console.groq.com/)
error_auth: ❌ Invalid or expired API Key. Please check and re-enter it.
error_rate_limit: ⏳ API rate limited (auto-retried multiple times). Please wait 1–2 minutes and try again.
error_context_too_long: ❌ Input too long — exceeds the model's context window. Please use shorter text or switch to a model with a larger context.
error_timeout:
⏳ Request timed out! The provider took too long to respond.

Suggestions:
- Try again later
- Switch to a faster model (e.g. qwen-turbo, qwen-plus)
- Shorten your input
book_no_books: No PDF files found. Please place PDFs in the book/ directory.
book_select_chapter: 👈 Select a chapter to view its content
qa_subtitle: Enter a book name and ask questions — AI will answer based on its knowledge of the book
qa_input_placeholder: Enter your question, e.g.: What is critical thinking? How to identify logical fallacies?…
qa_context_note: The above answer is generated based on *{book}*
tts_subtitle: Enter text and choose a voice to read it aloud
tts_no_text: ⚠️ Please enter text to read aloud.
tts_use_sample_voice: 🎤 Use Sample Voice (Fish Audio Voice Cloning)
tts_sample_voice_help: Pick a reference audio from the video_sample/ directory — Fish Audio will clone that voice for synthesis
tts_fish_api_key_help: Register at https://fish.audio/ to get an API key. Can also be set via FISH_AUDIO_API_KEY in config.py
tts_sample_no_files: ⚠️ No audio files found in video_sample/
tts_sample_no_key: ⚠️ Please enter your Fish Audio API Key first
tts_generating_sample: Synthesizing with Fish Audio voice cloning…
chat_subtitle: Ask AI anything — multi-turn conversation supported, upload files as context
chat_upload_label: 📎 Upload Files or Images (optional, multiple allowed)
chat_upload_help: Multiple file upload supported. Supports TXT, PDF, Markdown, CSV, JSON, Python, DOCX files, and PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP images. File content is used as conversation context; images are analyzed via vision models
chat_file_too_large: ⚠️ File too large (>{max_size} MB). Please upload a smaller file.
chat_file_empty: ⚠️ File content is empty — no text could be extracted.
gateway_upload_label: 📎 Upload Files or Images (optional, multiple allowed)
gateway_upload_help: Multiple file upload supported (TXT, PDF, DOCX, etc.) or images (PNG, JPG, etc.) — content will be used as Q&A context
gateway_subtitle: AI answers your gateway configuration questions based on Aviator expression engine docs
gateway_input_placeholder: Ask about gateway expressions, e.g.: How to use the md5 sign function? How does callGateWay work?…
gateway_context_note: The above answer is generated based on the Aviator expression engine documentation
write_subtitle: Enter text to analyse or optimize the perception the author wants to convey
write_input_placeholder: Enter the text you want to analyse…
write_perception_title: 🎯 Core Perception the Author Wants to Convey
model_custom_input_label: Or enter a custom model name
model_custom_input_help: Leave empty to use the model selected above; if entered, it overrides the selection
tab_visibility_help: Check the tabs you want to show; unchecked tabs will be hidden
chat_input_hint: Multi-line input supported; paste multiple screenshots as images
